title: If you're hiring a PM for AI or agent products
who: AI companies, agent startups, technical recruiters, product leaders
why: Start with the parts of the portfolio that show trust, workflow design, and operational thinking rather than generic AI enthusiasm.

links.label: Trustworthy AI Products Need Recovery Paths
AI Support Products Are Workflow Products

title: If you're hiring for platform, infrastructure, or developer tools
who: Developer platform teams, cloud companies, infrastructure orgs
why: This path is the clearest proof of where I have spent most of my operating time: developer experience, migration, orchestration, and platform trust.

links.label: Developer Platforms Mostly Fail On Friction
What Building Internal Platforms Taught Me

title: If you're a founder, startup operator, or investor
who: Founders, startup PM leaders, venture or operator networks
why: This path shows how I think about product leverage, operational clarity, and where small tools or better system design change outcomes.

links.label: Migration Readiness Is A Product Problem
Why I Still Like Small Python Tools
